# Vendor Parity Exemptions
# Commands that are intentionally NOT ported across all vendor adapters.
# Format: <vendor>:<command_name>  (one per line; # for comments)
# Vendors: claude | gemini | codex
#
# An "exemption" means: this command exists for vendor X but not vendor Y,
# and that's a deliberate choice — not a gap. Usually due to:
#   - Vendor-specific MCP (e.g. Figma MCP not available on Gemini CLI)
#   - Naming drift from a predecessor (war-room vs frontend-war-room)
#   - Feature-flagged rollout (Claude-first, Gemini catches up later)
#
# The file is read by scripts/validate-vendor-parity.sh.
# Declared in v2.1.4 (W4.16) — pre-existing gaps marked, NEW gaps still fail CI.
#
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# v3.0.x Gemini sync pass: the previous 17 `gemini:<name>` exemptions (ulak-ask,
# ulak-audit-deep, ulak-brainstorm, ulak-demo, ulak-explain, ulak-hello,
# ulak-locale, ulak-mcp-discover, ulak-next-steps, ulak-packs,
# ulak-pattern-extract, ulak-scaffold, ulak-search, ulak-start,
# ulak-subagent-dispatch, ulak-test-driven, triage-build, and the earlier
# `gemini:frontend-war-room` name-drift entry) are removed. All 18 commands
# are now shipped as native Gemini .toml files via scripts/sync-gemini-commands.sh.
# The sync is generated from the Claude-side .md source of truth.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Naming-drift exemptions — same capability, different name across vendors.
# TODO: retire `war-room/` alias once Gemini users migrate to /frontend-war-room.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# `war-room` (Gemini hand-authored alias) has no Claude counterpart — the
# canonical name on Claude is `frontend-war-room`. Kept as a Gemini-only
# alias for back-compat with pre-sync muscle memory.
claude:war-room

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Deliberate vendor-specific commands
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# `market-scan` is Gemini-only — early experiment; Claude uses market-researcher
# agent instead. Evaluate in a future pass: promote to Claude as a wrapper
# around the agent, or drop from Gemini.
claude:market-scan
